title: pavonia rubiformis
intro: Pavonia rubiformis, also known as the Rose Mallow, is a plant species in the mallow family that is native to tropical America. The medicinal properties of Pavonia rubiformis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of using Pavonia rubiformis include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and menstrual disorders, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, Pavonia rubiformis is often made into infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to be used for medicinal purposes.
